snippet.title: Zaroori Tha (Music Video) Rahat Fateh Ali Khan | Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon | Back 2 Love
snippet.description:
Aaj hum lekar aaye hain ustad Rahat Fateh Ali Khan ka one of the most iconic and heartbreaking tracks "Zaroori Tha". Agar aapne kabhi sachha pyaar kiya hai aur us dard ko mehsoos kiya hai, toh yeh gaana seedha aapke dil ko chhoo jayega. 🥺💔

Featuring the amazing Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon, yeh video ek aisi adhuri love story bayaan karta hai jo aapko emotional kar degi. Rahat Sahab ki magical voice aur deep lyrics ka yeh combo sahi mein next level hai!

Aapko is gaane ka kaunsa part sabse best laga? Hamein Comments mein zaroor batayein! 👇

snippet.title: When Faiz Ahmed Faiz Meets Deep House… Pure Magic | 🎧 | Soulful Deep House
snippet.description:
Some poetry doesn’t age.
It lives quietly inside generations.

“Teri Umeed Tera Intazaar Jab Se Hai” is a deeply emotional reinterpretation of the timeless words of فیض احمد فیض — transformed into a cinematic Deep House experience filled with longing, silence, and soulful intensity.

Presented by Max Song Studio, this fusion carries the warmth of classical Urdu poetry through atmospheric electronic textures, immersive rhythms, and haunting vocal expression.

From the very first line, the track unfolds like a memory you never escaped from.

✨ “Teri Umeed Tera Intazaar Jab Se Hai…”
A feeling of waiting that never truly ends.

🎼 Title: *Teri Umeed Tera Intazaar Jab Se Hai*
📝 Poetry: فیض احمد فیض
🎧 Presented by: Max Song Studio
🎤 Vocal: Max A.I Digital Tools
🖼️ Visuals: AI-generated cinematic storytelling

This piece is crafted for midnight listeners, wandering hearts, and lovers of poetry who find beauty inside sadness.

Close your eyes.
Let the beat breathe.
And lose yourself in the timeless world of Faiz.

💭 Which verse touched your soul the most?

❤️ If this journey moved you, don’t forget to:

snippet.title: Kami (Official Visualiser) - Samar Jafri
snippet.description:
This song is for the ones who blamed themselves for a love that was never meant to last. For the people who kept counting their flaws, thinking their shortcomings were the reason everything fell apart, when in reality some relationships are destined to fade no matter how hard you try. Sometimes the wrong person can make you question your worth, but the truth is, not every ending is your fault. Some people are simply not meant to stay.

The font of the lyrics is my own writing guys. Pls don’t judge 🙏🏻

Shot & Edited: Mohammad Mohtashim
